personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platform & AI/ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: AWS Data Engineer specializing in ML-enabled pipelines and scalable data platforms. Expert in designing ETL processes with Python and PySpark, leveraging AWS services like S3, Glue, and Redshift for high-scale data warehousing. Proven track record in building data solutions for analytics and forecasting, supporting data-driven decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python and Pandas, ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints for growth analytics, replacing manual processes.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform with S3 as landing zone, AWS Glue for ETL, and Redshift for ML forecasting workloads at cloud scale.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn, achieving 90%+ accuracy in predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and data models for historical retention, enabling seasonal risk forecasting and reporting.
Created interactive Streamlit dashboards with real-time capacity insights, supporting stakeholder decision-making and analytics.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems, ensuring data integrity for performance analytics.
Led 'FAST' project to data-mine real-user performance metrics, providing optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Participated in cloud migration planning to AWS, evaluating tools for mobile monitoring and APM readiness.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Designed custom dashboards and alerts for CA APM, adopted as standards for performance reporting across client environments.
Built Perl/Ksh scripts for automated data extraction, streamlining weekly performance reporting processes.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrades with zero downtime, coordinating cross-functional teams for seamless data system transitions.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Korn Shell
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift), PySpark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, ETL Design, Dimensional Modeling
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Streamlit, BMC TrueSight, Linux/Unix
skills.Legacy: Oracle RAC, PL/SQL, Dynatrace, CA APM, WebLogic/WebSphere

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, optimizing ETL and data access for enterprise-scale analytics with Snappy and Parquet compression.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven forecasting engine with Python and PySpark, reducing cycles by 90% and using Prophet/scikit-learn for bottleneck prediction 6 months ahead.
